name: Modified Tuscon Jailhouse Chili
recipeIngredient: Diced green chilies (1 can, 4 ounces, Casa Fiesta brand)
Nacho-sliced jalapeno peppers (1 can, 4 ounces, Casa Fiesta brand)
Bush's Best pinto beans, drained (1 can, 21 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the onion and puree the garlic.
- To puree garlic: Place a clove under the knife blade, hit the blade to remove the peel, dice the clove, add a little salt, and crush the diced clove under the heavy side of a knife until pureed.
2. Sauté onions in olive oil. When onions are clear, add garlic puree.
- Stir quickly (less than one minute) to prevent onions from browning.
3. Remove sautéed onions and garlic from the skillet.
4. Brown beef in the skillet and drain well.
5. Add sautéed onions and garlic back into the skillet, then pour everything into a crockpot.
6. Add all remaining ingredients to the crockpot and stir.
7. Cook on low for 8 hours or on high for 4 hours.
8. Optional: Cool the chili and reheat before serving. Garnish with grated sharp Cheddar cheese and sliced green onions, and serve with corn chips.
